ops.body: P3 SHIPPED as 523974f83df4 (CI green: Guides/CI/cc-notes; 1113 pytest + 51 walker at ship). The primitives layer: plan.tuning (5 knobs over former constants, quota-aware); optional-leg variants under R-E skip-carry equivalence — compile(P) ⊇ compile(V) for every optional-subset variant over airports, windows, and cash gateway dates, pinned as a parametrized matrix that literally compiles variant plans (three failed shortcuts on record: override-as-skip-source, stay-branch-only envelope, raw-trip-window cash dates); partial-chain leads (longest stay-reaching prefix, production-keyed TTL-honest states); manual chains under R-F (mandatory-coverage variants, read-time re-validation, per-chain manual_rejected); scout under R-G (read-time re-validation, typed UsageError vs NoData split — zero-byte is corruption) + R-H (additive beside buckets/program_sweeps). Bonus hardening: all $-anchored .match() validators → fullmatch (the 'NRT\n' IATA hole to the HTTP layer). Thirteen adversarial rounds across five stages (T2 took four — the R-E window/date class survived two per-branch patches before the single-exit ruling closed it; T3 took three incl. a capability ruling my own WO left ambiguous; T4 took four incl. two transport-death retries). T5 offline verify: all five scenarios passed incl. bit-identity vs 9b705434 via git worktree, zero seats.aero calls. Adjudications recorded in the P3 rulings note (664182ee). Engine doc 75cfaf4 updated. P4 (prose/doctrine) next: SKILL.md primitives catalog, planning.md drift, doctrine supersedes.
